THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DAVIE, BRIAN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 205 JONES STREET #104 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-08-1999, LEASE FORFEITED, STAY TO 9/8/99 12 P.M. EXECUTION TO ISSUE WITHOUT FURTHER NOTICE TO DEFT. NO PARTY ADMITS LIABILITY OR WRONGDOING. DEFT. WAIVES CLAIMS AND CAUSES OF ACTION ARISING THROUGH TENANCY INCLUDING THOSE UNDER CIV. CDE. 1542. SEE JUDGMT. FOR OTHER TERMS.

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. IN DEPT. 503A. ARNOLD W. EVJE PRO TEM JUDGE. D. CARTER, CLERK. ERIC THORNE, CSR. PARTIES PRESENT: CAROLE S. CULLUM, ATTY. FOR PLTF. AND DEFT. BRIAN DAVIE, IN PRO PER. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JUDGMENT. SEE CLERK MINUTES.
